text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since joining Tracen Academy as a
trainer, the days have been flying by.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While out on a stroll, I find myself walking
around the nearby shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm done moving the last box, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Elderly Storekeeper
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my! Done already? I'm sorry, dear.
They were heavy, weren't they?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! I'm used to doing all sorts of
heavy lifting back in Hokkaido with my
mom! I had to help around the family farm!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Carrying a few boxes of veggies is nothing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But enough about that! How's your hip,
ma'am?

text_block_list.name: Elderly Storekeeper
text_block_list.text: Oh, I feel much better thanks to you.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Storekeeper
text_block_list.text:
You're a student at Tracen Academy,
right? I'm so sorry to bother you in the
middle of training. Thank you so much for
your help.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
No problem! Anyway, I gotta head back
now! Take care!

text_block_list.name: Elderly Storekeeper
text_block_list.text:
Hm? She ran off in the complete opposite
direction of the academy... Will she be all
right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Worried that Special Week might be lost, I
decide to follow her.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew! It's the first time I've ran this far out. This really was  a nice outing for a change~…Wait!!!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Where even am I?!

choice_data_list: Would you like to get back to TracenAcademy?
Would you like to get back to TracenAcademy?
text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
W-w-w-w-what do I do?! I'm gonna miss
the dorm curfew!

choice_data_list: I'm a trainer. I'll show you the way back.
I'm a trainer. I'll show you the way back.
text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Um, you are...?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Really?! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thanks a bunch! We made it back just in
time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I have a big race tomorrow, so I
thought I'd spend some of my time off
training. I might've gone a bit too far,
though.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I just moved here from the countryside, so
I'm still not used to finding my way around
the city... You really did come at the
perfect time!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Spe! You're back! The school gates
were about to close for the day, and you
still weren't here, so I got a bit worried...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Suzuka! I'm sorry for making you
worry!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um... all righty then. Trainer, thanks again
for bringing me back in one piece! I gotta
go now.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: See ya!

With a smile on her face, Special Week
heads back to the Ritto dormitory. Silence
Suzuka bows lightly towards me before
following behind her.
The next morning...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer! It's finally time for
the tryout races.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
These races happen every two months
starting from June for a grand total of four
times per year. All the up-and-coming
students gather to show off their abilities,
and prove to the world that they're
race-ready.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Every student here will be gunning to
prove their skills to the best trainers in
hopes of getting scouted!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure today's races will be just as
exciting as ever.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Please do!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
A trainer is meant to serve as a racer's
guide—to support them when times are
tough, to lead them down the right path,
and to seek glory together.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I hope you meet someone whom you can
share a mutual bond of trust.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: But in any case, good luck!

The tryouts begin shortly after, and the
many trainers in attendance gaze upon the
rows of students in search of a runner with
potential.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yo soy el número uno! This condor is
gonna soar to the edge of the sky!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now then! Which lucky trainer is willing to
stand by my side? Any takers?

Although every student running today is
exceptionally skilled, one in particular
stands out—her running is immaculate!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We're at the race's last stretch! One final
corner! At the center of everybody's
attention is Special Week! She's in third
place, but it'll be a close one!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Now!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Special Week suddenly pulls ahead! She's
weaving her way to the very front! She
takes the lead!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm not done yet! Hraaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Special Week widens her lead! She's
ensuring the win! She takes first place!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... I did it! I won! Now I—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You're the person from yesterday! You
came to watch the race!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... Thanks! I hope I managed to show
you what I'm capable of!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I came to Tracen Academy to achieve my
dream, and it all starts with my debut... I'll
make sure it happens, no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yep!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanna run in the most prestigious races,
where only the best of the best racers are
allowed—the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So I have to run! I have to win! I have to
become strong enough that I don't ever
lose! If I do that, then—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll become the best racer in all of
Japan—for me, for Mom and Mama, and
for everybody else back home!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's my dream!

Special Week gazes straight at me with an
intense look of determination.

It's as if just beyond those glimmering
eyes, she can see the shining future she
dreams of gazing back at her.

choice_data_list: I want to help you with your dream!
I want to help you with your dream!
text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh... U-um... Are you still with me? Did I
say something weird? Sorry about that...

choice_data_list: Please, let me be your trainer!
Please, let me be your trainer!
text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wait... Are you scouting me?! For real?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course! I'd love for you to be my
Trainer!

And with that, I become Special Week's
trainer.
